start.title: Vocabulary Quiz
start.subtitle: Practice your vocabulary words!
start.description: Upload a CSV file or enter words manually to start practicing.
start.wordCount: {count, plural, =0 {No words} =1 {1 word} other {# words}} ready

upload.title: Upload Word List
upload.dragDrop: Drag and drop a CSV file here
upload.errorEmpty: The file appears to be empty
upload.errorFormat: Invalid file format. Please upload a CSV with two columns.
upload.errorColumn: Each row must have exactly two columns (word and translation)

manual.title: Enter Words Manually
manual.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all entries?
manual.validCount: {count, plural, =0 {No complete pairs} =1 {1 complete pair} other {# complete pairs}}
manual.instructions: Fill in both columns. Press Tab to move between cells. New rows are added automatically.

practice.title: Practice Mode
practice.instruction: Type the correct answer 3 times to practice:
practice.wellDone: Well done! Let's continue with the next word.

results.title: Quiz Complete!
results.noMistakes: Perfect! You got all words right on the first try!
results.motivationFewer: Great job! Can you solve them all on the first try next time?
results.motivationFaster: Nice! Want to try even faster?
results.motivationBoth: Amazing! You're getting better and better!

errors.title: Oops! Something went wrong
errors.description: Don't worry, it's not your fault! Let's try again.
errors.storageQuota: Storage is full. Please clear some browser data or use a smaller word list.
errors.storageCorrupted: Saved data appears to be corrupted. It has been reset.
errors.storageUnavailable: Unable to save data. Your browser may be in private mode.
errors.csvEmpty: The file appears to be empty. Please upload a file with word pairs.
errors.csvSingleColumn: The file needs two columns (word and translation).
errors.csvNoValidPairs: No valid word pairs found. Make sure each row has both a word and translation.
errors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
